title: Manage succession planning
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage succession planning demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify succession planning requirements

pcs.text: Identify and assess contingency and succession arrangements against enterprise and individual requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and assess contingency and succession arrangements against enterprise and individual requirements.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and evaluate income continuation options to find best fit for enterprise requirements.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and distinguish personal and business goals.
